payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and a small round knob near the lower-right; matte, slightly worn surface and visible wood texture, edge-cropped on the right side and appearing close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).
